title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

title: Stale stream timeout does not trigger fallback_providers chain

This means that if a provider is alive but unresp

title: [PR] feat(ai-service): 初始化 AI 客服服务
summary:
## 变更概要

本 PR 初始化并引入了全新的 AI 客服服务（`src/ai-service`），基于 Python + RAG 架构，为蓝网平台提供智能问答能力。

## 主要功能

- **RAG 智能代理**（`agent/`）
  - 支持流式对话响应
  - 基于上下文的问答流程管理
  - 统一的提示词模板

- **向量检索**（`retrieval/`）
  - 支持 Milvus 与 PgVector 两种向量存储后端
  - 语义分片（`chunking/`）与向量化存储
  - 按标签过滤的 Chunk 搜索

- **工具系统**（`tools/`）
  - 可扩展

summary:
## Ticket

## Summary

Complete on-premises deployment documentation for the TinyMCE AI service, cherry-picked from `feature/8.6.0/DOC-3401_DOC-3498` (#4137) and retargeted to `tinymce/8` for independent merge.
